docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $565.93 FILED BY KONG, CONAN F AS TO DEFENDANT HAYWARD, DEXTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2025 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEB-23-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. COURT UNAVAILABLE DURING CIVIC CENTER POWER OUTAGE. NO APPEARANCES. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-08-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $75.00 AS TO DEFENDANT HAYWARD, DEXTER

****AMENDED TO REFLECT DEFENDANT'S ABSENCE****SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-23-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-23-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF CONAN F. KONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DEXTER HAYWARD IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2026 - JUDGMENT.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR THE CASE TO BE HEARD FOR A NEW HEARING. HEARING SET FOR APR-24-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-24-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-24-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. PLAINTIFF CONAN F KONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DEXTER HAYWARD IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SEVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2026 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KONG, CONAN F IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HAYWARD, DEXTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KONG, CONAN F RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAYWARD, DEXTER $565.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $670.00, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF VS. DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER RE: FEBRUARY 24 2026 JUDGMENT PER CCP 473
